case_title: NORMAN LING VS. WILL GRUNIG ET AL

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JAN-08-2018. THE NOV-29-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR JAMES PATRICK CUNNINGHAM APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-08-2018 THROUGH APR-08-2018.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 17288013) FILED BY DEFENDANT GRUNIG, WILL
JURY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 17288013) DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT GRUNIG, WILL
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100025960) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LING, NORMAN JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-23-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LING, NORMAN AS TO DEFENDANT GRUNIG, WILL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-29-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-02-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-06-2017

NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT OF ENTIRE CASE/ UNCONDITIONAL (TRANSACTION ID # 100047073) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LING, NORMAN

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100022755), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LING, NORMAN SERVED SEP-16-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE SEP-16-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT GRUNIG, WILL
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-23-2018 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100037549) FILED BY DEFENDANT GRUNIG, WILL JURY DEMANDED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS (TRANSACTION ID # 100038466)
